selected_important_turn.text: I also feel that water is the most important. How about I take all 3 water, and you can take 2 firewood, and 2 foods?
selected_important_turn.why_important: This is a clear escalation to a zero-sum frame: you claim the entire scarce item (all 3 water). It shifts the negotiation away from trade-based, integrative solutions and makes the opponent more likely to resist or counter-demand. That move strongly shaped the subsequent exchange and narrowed options for mutual gain.
selected_important_turn.why_improvable_or_worth_amplifying: It's overly greedy and rigid given the opponent also signaled strong interest in water. By taking all of a single scarce resource you remove room for reciprocity and tradeoffs; you didn't try to create compensatory offers (e.g., give up items the opponent values in exchange for extra water). The line could have been framed to preserve bargaining space and fairness.
selected_important_turn.better_direction: Shift from an all-or-nothing claim to a conditional, trade-based proposal: offer to take more water only in exchange for something the opponent values (e.g., extra food or firewood), or propose a split plus compensations. Express willingness to consider alternatives and ask whether they’d accept a trade rather than unilaterally claiming all water.

expected_effect_on_negotiation.joint_gain: likely increase if replaced with conditional trades (more integrative value); otherwise currently low
expected_effect_on_negotiation.fairness: increase (if you offer compensations) vs decrease if left as-is
expected_effect_on_negotiation.ease_of_agreement: increase (if trade-based framing adopted) vs decrease if left rigid
expected_effect_on_negotiation.relationship: improve (if you show willingness to trade/compromise) vs worsen if you keep the all-or-nothing demand

value2reason.Medium: To avoid malnutrition,Also to keep myself energized and strong to do the daily chores
value2reason.High: To keep me hydrated, Since it would help me to survive high temperatures, to heal my wounds

value2reason.Low: Food is pretty important as well, but if I were to run out, I'd hope I'd be able to find some in the environment. Although a hunter, I am not.
value2reason.Medium: Firewood is important. Not as important as the water, but in this setting allows for both cooking and keeping warm.
value2reason.High: Water is one of the few things you cannot live without. And there is no substitute

dialogue.text: Who is willing to cooperate in a consensual offer so that we can all get fruitful dividends😡
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: 2 of water, plus 2 of food and 0 of firewood
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: That doesn't seem totally fair. How about I take 2 water instead?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I would give you 2 water in exchange for 3 food and 1 firewood
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: Hm. Getting warmer. What do you need the most of?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I need more water than the other options, you can keep 2 food and 2 firewood but 1 water
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I also feel that water is the most important. How about I take all 3 water, and you can take 2 firewood, and 2 foods?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I'm willing to accept 3 water for 2 food and 1 firewood. That way, I get my top priority and you get the rest. Let's finalize this deal.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: The deal has already been confirmed. I am leaving now.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2
